title: Galactic Gazetteer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Galactic Gazetteer''' was the name of two [[Wizards of the Coast]] features on particular regions in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]:

*[[Endor and the Moddell Sector]], in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]
*[[Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin]], a web supplement

{{Disambig}}
